TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == tuud kazizeng, tabakiay nu mitupinay tu tuud a tulaku u tulaku han a pangangan, angangan u miculu'ay tu tuud a kazizeng anca dingkiay a kazizeng, amililid tu zuma a kazizeng, tungus kasizuma nu misiwbayay a kazizeng. zuma miduduc tu baeket a pasizuma tu baketay atu ahemaway a kazizengn i lunuk kazizeng ayaw caaynay kadengdeng, mitupinay tu tuud a kazizeng baketay sepatay ku behel a kazizeng pangangan han tu subayu kazizeng Wagon. itawyaay a zizay hatu u mitupinay tu tuud a kazizeng u nihakaan ku cayay palawpes tu simal u ca-yu ingzing ku sapihaka, nika ahemaway nu mitupinay a kazizeng micukaymas tu simal, gasu, anca gasuay a simal a zayliw, 2010 a mihcaan izaw tu ku misiwbayay a kusi milungad tu simal dingkiay papulung tu pisaungay atu batiliay a mitupinay tu tuud a tulaku, nika caay henay kayadah ku nisanga'an a pacakay. mitengtengay kazizeng ŚÖ®śčĖŤĽä zuma tuud kazizeng anca u tangah nu kazieng pacait tu sapad anca sapitengteng, nipacait zikuz a kazizeng maliyuc tu pangkiw a patabaki, zikuz nu paculilan mapatabaki ku lalimucu', kyu zuma a kitizaan pala u micidekay a kazizeng "patinaku, Aw-cow zazan nu kazizeng". i Cong-kow-talu, hamin nu tengtengay a kazizeng u mitengtengay a kazizeng" han a pangangan, mitengtengan a kazizeng sakaput a kazizeng u zazan nu kazizeng, Taywan nu matatulesay a kazizeng han a pangangan. . balas kazizeng Á†āÁü≥ŤĽä balas kazizeng, pangangan han tu suwa taw cya han, Cong-kow-talu ca-se kazizeng han, u kay-tau tuud kazizeng han, angangan u sapiculu' tu balas atu kanaayan a zaylyaw nu sakakawawan, u sapiculu' tu sikitang, ba'tu. lamakung a kazizeng, zuma kitizaan canlye kazizeng han, u sapatayza tu amutu tuud kazizeng, tanengay a maniyul mikiwakiw tu amutu a singangan. . matahpuay tuud kazizeng ŚĮÜśĖóŤ≤®ŤĽä matahpuay tuud kazizeng, Cong-kow-talu pangangan han tu "sihakuay a kazizeng' caay kalecad tu hu-kuy, matahpuay a kazizeng caay kalaliyas ku sidama'ay a kazizeng atu tuwcya tangah. cacay u matahpuay a kazizeng, taneng a pasazumaen kuyni, isasa nu tulaku atu tangah nu kazizeng "ngangan nu Kang, cya-can atu tangah nu kazizeng" cacay mitupina tu tuud nu sihakuay, cacay sapatapabaw a sapad "pangangan han nu Sya-kang kikul sapad". hu-kuy a kazizeng, mazeting kuyza matineng tu aw sapiculu' tu hu-kuy a kazizeng. hu-kuay a kazizeng, taneng palatuluen, mitengtengay a kazizeng "pangangan han nu Sya-kang sisatengtenganay" mitengtengay a kazizeng "pangangan nu Sya-kang u mitengtengan tu kazizedng" a hu-kuy, hu-kuy kazizeng a kung-tun iza ku 35 kung-tun " 20 ing-ce ku hu-kuy" atu 43 kung-tun "40/45 ing depah ku hu-kuy". sapaday tulaku, singangan aca tu tulaku, u tabakiay nu mitupinay tu baketay a tuud a tulaku. i ayzaay nisanga' tu tabakiay anca hinaazihay tu sakawawan. ayza katuud ku micukaymas tu canacanan a tuudan miculu' tu cayay kabatan a zazan. u sapiselep tu sapiculu' a kalisiw, pakalamkam tu sakakawawan, mikyezey' tu nikawaw a demiad a kapah ku nikawaw. taneng pacait i likut, micunus tu sapicukaymas. simal, u maka labuay nu lala' a simal nihudhudan anca palasawaden, misaadidi' tahkal a icelang, u taneng a matuduhay a cinan pacamul han tu nanumay, taneng sapilikat a zaylyaw. mapangangan i Sang-kang u simal "dingki" han. simal u nayay ku kulit a nanum "caluway amahapinang caay kalecad ku sin-wan-ceay a simal, uzuma pacumuden ku zumaay a kulit", micidek ku sanek. madayum m alabali, madayum malikat. angangan C5ÔĹěC12 ku simal tin atu kasasuma a hown-tin, adidi' ku bangsis tin atu liw-huw-u. sapicukaymas sapilikat a simal i labu nu kikay, kanca i pipenec caay ka lunuk sa matuduh. u icelang nu simal miduduc tu kayadah nu sin-wan. cunus tu simal sin-wanay zuma pacumuden ku se-i-ci-cyen, nika sikala'cus nu uzip, saaca mapeci' ku sakuwan tu sapatahkal tu mauningay mitiyung tu sapaniyul, , namahiza 1980 a mihcaan malingatu u-cyen a simal haymaw satu makutay nu yu-cyen simal "nipangangan "kaw-ci simal", ayza simal tu nu hikuki dada'", nu zuma malumanay a ingzing hakay cukaymasen caay henay kaicelang micumud ku bali panan nu aenengan, anu u-cyen simal dada' ku cukaymasan amatabal mapeci', mahiniay a ingzing kapah amkicukaymas tu u-cyen a siamal, nika alahican pacunusen tu kutay a cyen-ci. Śõ†ś≠§1980 . katukuh 2011 a mihcaan, hamin nu kitakit izaw tu ku A-bu-han, A-al atu Li-ya,I-la-ke, Caw-syen, Mey-tyen atu Ye-men enem a kanatal ku micukaymasay henay tu yu-cyen a simal, kapulung a kanatal atu uyni enemay a kanatal makakadum paketun tu sapialesd tu yu-cyen simal a kawaw, taneng i 2013 a mihcaan hamin a kitakit acaay tu picukaymas tu yu-cyen sima. 2021 a nihca 8 a bulad 30 a demiad, kapulung a kanatal makakadum tu enemay a kanatal milekakawa tu hekal pakatineng i kitakit nu sazikuzay pawapenay tu yu-cyen simal a kanatal A-al-ci- li-ya i 7 a bulad malingatu pasatezep a pawapen, u tatenga'ay tu malikisi ku yu-cyen simal. Ťá≥2011ŚĻī, . Taywan ŤáļÁĀ£ ai-sin-cen "simal, sumamad zayhan u al-sin-cen inzing a kazizedng atu sakikayan "mahiniay sapibelisiw, salutalut" namicukaymas a malungad, angangan sikaw-ci simal atu 3~5% ku ai-sin-cen simal, zikuz sumadan tu u-ci-yen simal palamelen tu al-sin-cen simal a pacakay. Kitizaay a apacakay haymaw satu malelul, ayaw nu i 2006 a mihca 4 a bulad 25 a demiad tatenga'ay tu misatezep pacakay, ayaw a misatezep pacakay sazikuzay a aca pay-kungh-sen 28 ku kalisiw nu Taywan, imahini mahamin tu mapacakay. kaw-ci simal, u cayay ku kalawlaway, kasumamadan u zse-i-ci-cyen malau u sapitena' amatuduh, u icelang pakala macapi tu 92Ôľć95. tini i 2000 a mihca 1 abulad 1 a demiad malingatu masatezep a pacakay, misabalucu' tu malumanay pakutay tu 95 u-ci-yen, saayaway tahkal nu kusiay nu balakiay tu a kazizeng maydih pacunus mikutay tu cyen-ci. 92 u-cyen simal, u sumilaway, zuma sapicukaymas i singzing tu apuyu'ay a akazizeng, nika zuma baluhay a kazizeng kapah tu a cukaymasan caay tu kamakuhac, kapah tu ku nikatuduh. 95 u-cyen simal, kulawlawan, nu Taywan a simalan nu satabakiay simalan, matatungus tu i zazanay nu muculilay a kazizeng atu hamin i Taywan nu pacakayay tu kazizeng tu simalay a kazizeng. 95 + u-cyen simal, Tay-su batuay nu tekeday a tuud tu misiwbayay, sin-wan a aca pakal tu ~96, Tay-su batuay i 2015 a mihca 6 a bulad 24 a demiad malunga'tu misanga' pacakay, mikutay tu Tay-su 95 u-cyen simal. 95 u-cyen simal. u kasumanamanahan, tatungu i talakawaay a inzing ku kasukut, u tineng wayway u sakapahay nipacumud a kazizengan. nika i pisumadan tu kazizengan zuma nisumad tu ci-kang cunusan tuyni a simal a kapah ku kazizeng. E3 alikulu simal, nu cong-yu I 2007 a mihcaan malingatu patatungus tu ce-bu micuduh pakutay palekal tu sasimalan, nipawapenan tu u-cyen simalan pacamul tu 3% alikulu, nipanutek amiwada' tu malecaday a tuduh nu simal tu nipatahkal tu tan. Alikulu talakaw ku sin-wan-ce talakaw ku yeng, matuduh taneng makelul ku kamakuhac, belat nu lamal atu likat a lamal pitalakawan ku simal a lihalay supeden ku tadesimal. kanahatu alikulu a akuti' kikalacusan tu simal, nika uyza E3 kapah ku katuduh, palalecad tu tusaay kakapah nu ingzing atu malecad tu ku nipalawpes tu simal. atatungu tu kazized nngan pisabalucu' mipalita tu misangaay tu kazizeng a kusi. E3 .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tuud kaziz…ôŇč, tabakiaj nu mitupinaj tu tuud a tur~…ĺaku u tur~…ĺaku ńßan a paŇčaŇčan, aŇčaŇčan u mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, amir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu zuma a kaziz…ôŇč, tuŇčus kasizuma nu misiwbajaj a kaziz…ôŇč. zuma midudu ¶ tu ba…ôk…ôt a pasizuma tu bak…ôtaj atu ańß…ômawaj a kaziz…ôŇčn i r~…ĺunuk kaziz…ôŇč ajaw ¶aajnaj kad…ôŇčd…ôŇč, mitupinaj tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč bak…ôtaj s…ôpataj ku b…ôńß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu subaju kaziz…ôŇč wagon. itawjaaj a zizaj ńßatu u mitupinaj tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč u nińßakaan ku ¶ajaj par~…ĺawp…ôs tu simar~…ĺ u ¶a-ju iŇčziŇč ku sapińßaka, nika ańß…ômawaj nu mitupinaj a kaziz…ôŇč mi ¶ukajmas tu simar~…ĺ, gasu, an ¶a gasuaj a simar~…ĺ a zajr~…ĺiw, **** a mińß ¶aan izaw tu ku misiwbajaj a kusi mir~…ĺuŇčad tu simar~…ĺ diŇčkiaj papur~…ĺuŇč tu pisauŇčaj atu batir~…ĺiaj a mitupinaj tu tuud a tur~…ĺaku, nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kajadańß ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an a pa ¶akaj. mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj kaziz…ôŇč *** zuma tuud kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a u taŇčańß nu kazi…ôŇč pa ¶ait tu sapad an ¶a sapit…ôŇčt…ôŇč, nipa ¶ait zikuz a kaziz…ôŇč mar~…ĺiju ¶ tu paŇčkiw a patabaki, zikuz nu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan mapatabaki ku r~…ĺar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ °, kju zuma a kitizaan par~…ĺa u mi ¶id…ôkaj a kaziz…ôŇč "patinaku, aw- ¶ow zazan nu kaziz…ôŇč". i ¶oŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu, ńßamin nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč u mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj a ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu sikitaŇč, ba Ē~ °tu. r~…ĺamakuŇč a kaziz…ôŇč, zuma kitizaan ¶anr~…ĺj…ô kaziz…ôŇč ńßan, u sapatajza tu amutu tuud kaziz…ôŇč, tan…ôŇčaj a manijur~…ĺ mikiwakiw tu amutu a siŇčaŇčan. . matańßpuaj tuud kaziz…ôŇč **** matańßpuaj tuud kaziz…ôŇč, ¶oŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "sińßakuaj a kaziz…ôŇč Ē~ ° ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ńßu-kuj, matańßpuaj a kaziz…ôŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺijas ku mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčan tu kaziz…ôdŇč" a ńßu-kuj, ńßu-kuj kaziz…ôŇč a kuŇč-tun iza ku ** kuŇč-tun " ** iŇč- ¶…ô ku ńßu-kuj" atu ** kuŇč-tun "**/** iŇč d…ôpańß ku ńßu-kuj". sapadaj tur~…ĺaku, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu tu ¶ajaj kabatan a zazan. u sapis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a kar~…ĺisiw, pakar~…ĺamkam tu sakakawawan, mikj…ôz…ô Ē~ ° tu nikawaw a d…ômiad a kapańß ku nikawaw. tan…ôŇč pa ¶ait i r~…ĺikut, mi ¶unus tu sapi ¶ukajmas. simar~…ĺ, u maka r~…ĺabuaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a simar~…ĺ nińßudńßudan an ¶a par~…ĺasawad…ôn, misaadidi Ē~ ° tańßkar~…ĺ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u tan…ôŇč a matuduńßaj a ¶inan pa ¶amur~…ĺ ńßan tu nanumaj, tan…ôŇč sapir~…ĺikat a zajr~…ĺjaw. mapaŇčaŇčan i saŇč-kaŇč u simar~…ĺ "diŇčki" ńßan. simar~…ĺ u najaj ku kur~…ĺit a nanum " ¶ar~…ĺuwaj amańßapinaŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku Ē~ ° ku baŇčsis tin atu r~…ĺiw-ńßuw-u. sapi ¶ukajmas sapir~…ĺikat a simar~…ĺ i r~…ĺabu nu kikaj, kan ¶a i pip…ôn…ô ¶ ¶aaj ka r~…ĺunuk sa matuduńß. u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu simar~…ĺ midudu ¶ tu kajadańß nu ¶ukajmas tu u- ¶j…ôn a siamar~…ĺ, nika ar~…ĺańßi ¶an pa ¶unus…ôn tu kutaj a ¶j…ôn- ¶i. ****** . katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, ńßamin nu kitakit izaw tu ku a-bu-ńßan, a-ar~…ĺ atu r~…ĺi-ja,i-r~…ĺa-k…ô, ¶aw-sj…ôn, m…ô-tj…ôn atu j…ô-m…ôn …ôn…ôm a kanatar~…ĺ ku mi ¶ukajmasaj ńß…ônaj tu ju- ¶j…ôn a simar~…ĺ, kapur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ atu ujni …ôn…ômaj a kanatar~…ĺ makakadum pak…ôtun tu sapiar~…ĺ…ôsd tu …ôn…ômaj a kanatar~…ĺ mir~…ĺ…ôkakawa tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ pakatin…ôŇč i kitakit nu sazikuzaj pawap…ônaj tu ju- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ a-ar~…ĺ- ¶i- r~…ĺi-ja i * a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasat…ôz…ôp a pawap…ôn, u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu mar~…ĺikisi ku ju- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ. ******, . tajwan ** ai-sin- ¶…ôn "simar~…ĺ, sumamad zajńßan u ar~…ĺ-sin- ¶…ôn inziŇč a kaziz…ôdŇč atu sakikajan "mańßiniaj sapib…ôr~…ĺisiw, sar~…ĺutar~…ĺut" nami ¶ukajmas a mar~…ĺuŇčad, aŇčaŇčan sikaw- ¶i simar~…ĺ atu *~*% ku ai-sin- ¶…ôn simar~…ĺ, zikuz sumadan tu u- ¶i-j…ôn simar~…ĺ par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ…ôn tu ar~…ĺ-sin- ¶…ôn simar~…ĺ a pa ¶akaj. kitizaaj a apa ¶akaj ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ, ajaw nu i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu misat…ôz…ôp pa ¶akaj, ajaw a misat…ôz…ôp pa ¶akaj sazikuzaj a a ¶a paj-kuŇčńß-s…ôn ** ku kar~…ĺisiw nu tajwan, imańßini mańßamin tu mapa ¶akaj. kaw- ¶i simar~…ĺ, u ¶ajaj ku kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj, kasumamadan u zs…ô-i- ¶i- ¶j…ôn mar~…ĺau u sapit…ôna Ē~ ° amatuduńß, u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč pakar~…ĺa ma ¶api tu *****. tini i **** a mińß ¶a * abur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu masat…ôz…ôp a pa ¶akaj, misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺumanaj pakutaj tu ** u- ¶i-j…ôn, saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ nu kusiaj nu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a kaziz…ôŇč majdińß pa ¶unus mikutaj tu ¶j…ôn- ¶i. ** u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ, u sumir~…ĺawaj, zuma sapi ¶ukajmas i siŇčziŇč tu apuju Ē~ °aj a akaziz…ôŇč, nika zuma bar~…ĺuńßaj a kaziz…ôŇč kapańß tu a ¶ukajmasan ¶aaj tu kamakuńßa ¶, kapańß tu ku nikatuduńß. ** u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ, kur~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, nu tajwan a simar~…ĺan nu satabakiaj simar~…ĺan, matatuŇčus tu i zazanaj nu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč atu ńßamin i tajwan nu pa ¶akajaj tu kaziz…ôŇč tu simar~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč. ** + u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ, taj-su batuaj nu t…ôk…ôdaj a tuud tu misiwbajaj, sin-wan a a ¶a pakar~…ĺ tu ~**, taj-su batuaj i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ °tu misaŇča Ē~ ° pa ¶akaj, mikutaj tu taj-su ** u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ. ** u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ. u kasumanamanańßan, tatuŇču i tar~…ĺakawaaj a inziŇč ku kasukut, u tin…ôŇč wajwaj u sakapańßaj nipa ¶umud a kaziz…ôŇčan. nika i pisumadan tu kaziz…ôŇčan zuma nisumad tu ¶i-kaŇč ¶unusan tujni a simar~…ĺ a kapańß ku kaziz…ôŇč. …ô* ar~…ĺikur~…ĺu simar~…ĺ, nu ¶oŇč-ju i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu patatuŇčus tu ¶…ô-bu mi ¶uduńß pakutaj par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sasimar~…ĺan, nipawap…ônan tu u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺan pa ¶amur~…ĺ tu *% ar~…ĺikur~…ĺu, nipanut…ôk amiwada Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a tuduńß nu simar~…ĺ tu nipatańßkar~…ĺ tu tan. ar~…ĺikur~…ĺu tar~…ĺakaw ku sin-wan- ¶…ô tar~…ĺakaw ku j…ôŇč, matuduńß tan…ôŇč mak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ku kamakuńßa ¶, b…ôr~…ĺat nu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ atu r~…ĺikat a r~…ĺamar~…ĺ pitar~…ĺakawan ku simar~…ĺ a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj sup…ôd…ôn ku tad…ôsimar~…ĺ. kanańßatu ar~…ĺikur~…ĺu a akuti Ē~ ° kikar~…ĺa ¶usan tu simar~…ĺ, nika ujza …ô* kapańß ku katuduńß, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tusaaj kakapańß nu iŇčziŇč atu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu simar~…ĺ. atatuŇču tu kaziz…ôd nŇčan pisabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mipar~…ĺita tu misaŇčaaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a kusi. …ô* .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == tuud kazizeng, tabakiay nu mitupinay tu tuud a tulaku u tulaku han a pangangan, angangan u miculu'ay tu tuud a kazizeng anca dingkiay a kazizeng, amililid tu zuma a kazizeng, tungus kasizuma nu misiwbayay a kazizeng. zuma miduduc tu baeket a pasizuma tu baketay atu ahemaway a kazizengn i lunuk kazizeng ayaw caaynay kadengdeng, mitupinay tu tuud a kazizeng baketay sepatay ku behel a kazizeng pangangan han tu subayu kazizeng Wagon. itawyaay a zizay hatu u mitupinay tu tuud a kazizeng u nihakaan ku cayay palawpes tu simal u ca-yu ingzing ku sapihaka, nika ahemaway nu mitupinay a kazizeng micukaymas tu simal, gasu, anca gasuay a simal a zayliw, 2010 a mihcaan izaw tu ku misiwbayay a kusi milungad tu simal dingkiay papulung tu pisaungay atu batiliay a mitupinay tu tuud a tulaku, nika caay henay kayadah ku nisanga'an a pacakay. mitengtengay kazizeng ŚÖ®śčĖŤĽä zuma tuud kazizeng anca u tangah nu kazieng pacait tu sapad anca sapitengteng, nipacait zikuz a kazizeng maliyuc tu pangkiw a patabaki, zikuz nu paculilan mapatabaki ku lalimucu', kyu zuma a kitizaan pala u micidekay a kazizeng "patinaku, Aw-cow zazan nu kazizeng". i Cong-kow-talu, hamin nu tengtengay a kazizeng u mitengtengay a kazizeng" han a pangangan, mitengtengan a kazizeng sakaput a kazizeng u zazan nu kazizeng, Taywan nu matatulesay a kazizeng han a pangangan. . balas kazizeng Á†āÁü≥ŤĽä balas kazizeng, pangangan han tu suwa taw cya han, Cong-kow-talu ca-se kazizeng han, u kay-tau tuud kazizeng han, angangan u sapiculu' tu balas atu kanaayan a zaylyaw nu sakakawawan, u sapiculu' tu sikitang, ba'tu. lamakung a kazizeng, zuma kitizaan canlye kazizeng han, u sapatayza tu amutu tuud kazizeng, tanengay a maniyul mikiwakiw tu amutu a singangan. . matahpuay tuud kazizeng ŚĮÜśĖóŤ≤®ŤĽä matahpuay tuud kazizeng, Cong-kow-talu pangangan han tu "sihakuay a kazizeng' caay kalecad tu hu-kuy, matahpuay a kazizeng caay kalaliyas ku sidama'ay a kazizeng atu tuwcya tangah. cacay u matahpuay a kazizeng, taneng a pasazumaen kuyni, isasa nu tulaku atu tangah nu kazizeng "ngangan nu Kang, cya-can atu tangah nu kazizeng" cacay mitupina tu tuud nu sihakuay, cacay sapatapabaw a sapad "pangangan han nu Sya-kang kikul sapad". hu-kuy a kazizeng, mazeting kuyza matineng tu aw sapiculu' tu hu-kuy a kazizeng. hu-kuay a kazizeng, taneng palatuluen, mitengtengay a kazizeng "pangangan han nu Sya-kang sisatengtenganay" mitengtengay a kazizeng "pangangan nu Sya-kang u mitengtengan tu kazizedng" a hu-kuy, hu-kuy kazizeng a kung-tun iza ku 35 kung-tun " 20 ing-ce ku hu-kuy" atu 43 kung-tun "40/45 ing depah ku hu-kuy". sapaday tulaku, singangan aca tu tulaku, u tabakiay nu mitupinay tu baketay a tuud a tulaku. i ayzaay nisanga' tu tabakiay anca hinaazihay tu sakawawan. ayza katuud ku micukaymas tu canacanan a tuudan miculu' tu cayay kabatan a zazan. u sapiselep tu sapiculu' a kalisiw, pakalamkam tu sakakawawan, mikyezey' tu nikawaw a demiad a kapah ku nikawaw. taneng pacait i likut, micunus tu sapicukaymas. simal, u maka labuay nu lala' a simal nihudhudan anca palasawaden, misaadidi' tahkal a icelang, u taneng a matuduhay a cinan pacamul han tu nanumay, taneng sapilikat a zaylyaw. mapangangan i Sang-kang u simal "dingki" han. simal u nayay ku kulit a nanum "caluway amahapinang caay kalecad ku sin-wan-ceay a simal, uzuma pacumuden ku zumaay a kulit", micidek ku sanek. madayum m alabali, madayum malikat. angangan C5ÔĹěC12 ku simal tin atu kasasuma a hown-tin, adidi' ku bangsis tin atu liw-huw-u. sapicukaymas sapilikat a simal i labu nu kikay, kanca i pipenec caay ka lunuk sa matuduh. u icelang nu simal miduduc tu kayadah nu sin-wan. cunus tu simal sin-wanay zuma pacumuden ku se-i-ci-cyen, nika sikala'cus nu uzip, saaca mapeci' ku sakuwan tu sapatahkal tu mauningay mitiyung tu sapaniyul, , namahiza 1980 a mihcaan malingatu u-cyen a simal haymaw satu makutay nu yu-cyen simal "nipangangan "kaw-ci simal", ayza simal tu nu hikuki dada'", nu zuma malumanay a ingzing hakay cukaymasen caay henay kaicelang micumud ku bali panan nu aenengan, anu u-cyen simal dada' ku cukaymasan amatabal mapeci', mahiniay a ingzing kapah amkicukaymas tu u-cyen a siamal, nika alahican pacunusen tu kutay a cyen-ci. Śõ†ś≠§1980 . katukuh 2011 a mihcaan, hamin nu kitakit izaw tu ku A-bu-han, A-al atu Li-ya,I-la-ke, Caw-syen, Mey-tyen atu Ye-men enem a kanatal ku micukaymasay henay tu yu-cyen a simal, kapulung a kanatal atu uyni enemay a kanatal makakadum paketun tu sapialesd tu yu-cyen simal a kawaw, taneng i 2013 a mihcaan hamin a kitakit acaay tu picukaymas tu yu-cyen sima. 2021 a nihca 8 a bulad 30 a demiad, kapulung a kanatal makakadum tu enemay a kanatal milekakawa tu hekal pakatineng i kitakit nu sazikuzay pawapenay tu yu-cyen simal a kanatal A-al-ci- li-ya i 7 a bulad malingatu pasatezep a pawapen, u tatenga'ay tu malikisi ku yu-cyen simal. Ťá≥2011ŚĻī, . Taywan ŤáļÁĀ£ ai-sin-cen "simal, sumamad zayhan u al-sin-cen inzing a kazizedng atu sakikayan "mahiniay sapibelisiw, salutalut" namicukaymas a malungad, angangan sikaw-ci simal atu 3~5% ku ai-sin-cen simal, zikuz sumadan tu u-ci-yen simal palamelen tu al-sin-cen simal a pacakay. Kitizaay a apacakay haymaw satu malelul, ayaw nu i 2006 a mihca 4 a bulad 25 a demiad tatenga'ay tu misatezep pacakay, ayaw a misatezep pacakay sazikuzay a aca pay-kungh-sen 28 ku kalisiw nu Taywan, imahini mahamin tu mapacakay. kaw-ci simal, u cayay ku kalawlaway, kasumamadan u zse-i-ci-cyen malau u sapitena' amatuduh, u icelang pakala macapi tu 92Ôľć95. tini i 2000 a mihca 1 abulad 1 a demiad malingatu masatezep a pacakay, misabalucu' tu malumanay pakutay tu 95 u-ci-yen, saayaway tahkal nu kusiay nu balakiay tu a kazizeng maydih pacunus mikutay tu cyen-ci. 92 u-cyen simal, u sumilaway, zuma sapicukaymas i singzing tu apuyu'ay a akazizeng, nika zuma baluhay a kazizeng kapah tu a cukaymasan caay tu kamakuhac, kapah tu ku nikatuduh. 95 u-cyen simal, kulawlawan, nu Taywan a simalan nu satabakiay simalan, matatungus tu i zazanay nu muculilay a kazizeng atu hamin i Taywan nu pacakayay tu kazizeng tu simalay a kazizeng. 95 + u-cyen simal, Tay-su batuay nu tekeday a tuud tu misiwbayay, sin-wan a aca pakal tu ~96, Tay-su batuay i 2015 a mihca 6 a bulad 24 a demiad malunga'tu misanga' pacakay, mikutay tu Tay-su 95 u-cyen simal. 95 u-cyen simal. u kasumanamanahan, tatungu i talakawaay a inzing ku kasukut, u tineng wayway u sakapahay nipacumud a kazizengan. nika i pisumadan tu kazizengan zuma nisumad tu ci-kang cunusan tuyni a simal a kapah ku kazizeng. E3 alikulu simal, nu cong-yu I 2007 a mihcaan malingatu patatungus tu ce-bu micuduh pakutay palekal tu sasimalan, nipawapenan tu u-cyen simalan pacamul tu 3% alikulu, nipanutek amiwada' tu malecaday a tuduh nu simal tu nipatahkal tu tan. Alikulu talakaw ku sin-wan-ce talakaw ku yeng, matuduh taneng makelul ku kamakuhac, belat nu lamal atu likat a lamal pitalakawan ku simal a lihalay supeden ku tadesimal. kanahatu alikulu a akuti' kikalacusan tu simal, nika uyza E3 kapah ku katuduh, palalecad tu tusaay kakapah nu ingzing atu malecad tu ku nipalawpes tu simal. atatungu tu kazized nngan pisabalucu' mipalita tu misangaay tu kazizeng a kusi. E3 .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tuud kaziz…ôŇč, tabakiaj nu mitupinaj tu tuud a tur~…ĺaku u tur~…ĺaku ńßan a paŇčaŇčan, aŇčaŇčan u mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, amir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu zuma a kaziz…ôŇč, tuŇčus kasizuma nu misiwbajaj a kaziz…ôŇč. zuma midudu ¶ tu ba…ôk…ôt a pasizuma tu bak…ôtaj atu ańß…ômawaj a kaziz…ôŇčn i r~…ĺunuk kaziz…ôŇč ajaw ¶aajnaj kad…ôŇčd…ôŇč, mitupinaj tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč bak…ôtaj s…ôpataj ku b…ôńß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu subaju kaziz…ôŇč wagon. itawjaaj a zizaj ńßatu u mitupinaj tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč u nińßakaan ku ¶ajaj par~…ĺawp…ôs tu simar~…ĺ u ¶a-ju iŇčziŇč ku sapińßaka, nika ańß…ômawaj nu mitupinaj a kaziz…ôŇč mi ¶ukajmas tu simar~…ĺ, gasu, an ¶a gasuaj a simar~…ĺ a zajr~…ĺiw, **** a mińß ¶aan izaw tu ku amatuduńß, u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč pakar~…ĺa ma ¶api tu *****. tini i **** a mińß ¶a * abur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu masat…ôz…ôp a pa ¶akaj, misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺumanaj pakutaj tu ** u- ¶i-j…ôn, saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ nu kusiaj nu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a kaziz…ôŇč majdińß pa ¶unus mikutaj tu ¶j…ôn- ¶i. ** u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ, u sumir~…ĺawaj, zuma sapi ¶ukajmas i siŇčziŇč tu apuju Ē~ °aj a akaziz…ôŇč, nika zuma bar~…ĺuńßaj a kaziz…ôŇč kapańß tu a ¶ukajmasan ¶aaj tu kamakuńßa ¶, kapańß tu ku nikatuduńß. ** u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ, kur~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, nu tajwan a simar~…ĺan nu satabakiaj simar~…ĺan, matatuŇčus tu i zazanaj nu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč atu ńßamin i tajwan nu pa ¶akajaj tu kaziz…ôŇč tu simar~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč. ** + u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ, taj-su batuaj nu t…ôk…ôdaj a tuud tu misiwbajaj, sin-wan a a ¶a pakar~…ĺ tu ~**, taj-su batuaj i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ °tu misaŇča Ē~ ° pa ¶akaj, mikutaj tu taj-su ** u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ. ** u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺ. u kasumanamanańßan, tatuŇču i tar~…ĺakawaaj a inziŇč ku kasukut, u tin…ôŇč wajwaj u sakapańßaj nipa ¶umud a kaziz…ôŇčan. nika i pisumadan tu kaziz…ôŇčan zuma nisumad tu ¶i-kaŇč ¶unusan tujni a simar~…ĺ a kapańß ku kaziz…ôŇč. …ô* ar~…ĺikur~…ĺu simar~…ĺ, nu ¶oŇč-ju i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu patatuŇčus tu ¶…ô-bu mi ¶uduńß pakutaj par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sasimar~…ĺan, nipawap…ônan tu u- ¶j…ôn simar~…ĺan pa ¶amur~…ĺ tu *% ar~…ĺikur~…ĺu, nipanut…ôk amiwada Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a tuduńß nu simar~…ĺ tu nipatańßkar~…ĺ tu tan. ar~…ĺikur~…ĺu tar~…ĺakaw ku sin-wan- ¶…ô tar~…ĺakaw ku j…ôŇč, matuduńß tan…ôŇč mak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ku kamakuńßa ¶, b…ôr~…ĺat nu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ atu r~…ĺikat a r~…ĺamar~…ĺ pitar~…ĺakawan ku simar~…ĺ a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj sup…ôd…ôn ku tad…ôsimar~…ĺ. kanańßatu ar~…ĺikur~…ĺu a akuti Ē~ ° kikar~…ĺa ¶usan tu simar~…ĺ, nika ujza …ô* kapańß ku katuduńß, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tusaaj kakapańß nu iŇčziŇč atu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu simar~…ĺ. atatuŇču tu kaziz…ôd nŇčan pisabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mipar~…ĺita tu misaŇčaaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a kusi. …ô* .
